Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Analytic Fog Rendering with Volumetric Primitives (2025) 85 upvotes, 8 comments
  2. UUID package coming to Go standard library 28 upvotes, 1 comments
  3. Galileo's handwritten notes found in ancient astronomy text 56 upvotes, 6 comments
  4. Entomologists use a particle accelerator to image ants at scale 103 upvotes, 18 comments
  5. CT Scans of Health Wearables 191 upvotes, 40 comments
  6. Ada 2022 116 upvotes, 23 comments
  7. Hardening Firefox with Anthropic's Red Team 512 upvotes, 148 comments
  8. Astra: An open-source observatory control software 85 upvotes, 21 comments
  9. Art Bits from HyperCard 65 upvotes, 15 comments
  10. LibreSprite – open-source pixel art editor 270 upvotes, 86 comments
  11. Plasma Bigscreen – 10-foot interface for KDE plasma 201 upvotes, 63 comments
  12. this css proves me human 182 upvotes, 65 comments
  13. Good Bad ISPs 108 upvotes, 37 comments
  14. Show HN: Claude-replay – A video-like player for Claude Code sessions 74 upvotes, 28 comments
  15. A tool that removes censorship from open-weight LLMs 133 upvotes, 58 comments
  16. Maybe There's a Pattern Here? 24 upvotes, 6 comments
  17. Workers who love ‘synergizing paradigms’ might be bad at their jobs 521 upvotes, 297 comments
  18. Tell HN: I'm 60 years old. Claude Code has ignited a passion again 162 upvotes, 88 comments
  19. Show HN: Moongate – Ultima Online server emulator in .NET 10 with Lua scripting 234 upvotes, 134 comments
  20. Tech employment now significantly worse than the 2008 or 2020 recessions 773 upvotes, 519 comments
  21. The Shady World of IP Leasing 74 upvotes, 40 comments
  22. C# strings silently kill your SQL Server indexes in Dapper 70 upvotes, 42 comments
  23. A Modular Robot Dashboard 4 upvotes, 0 comments
  24. What canceled my Go context? 18 upvotes, 10 comments
  25. LLMs work best when the user defines their acceptance criteria first 80 upvotes, 71 comments
  26. Can a wealthy family change the course of a deadly brain disease? 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  27. Show HN: Kula – Lightweight, self-contained Linux server monitoring tool 15 upvotes, 14 comments
  28. Launch HN: Palus Finance (YC W26): Better yields on idle cash for startups, SMBs 40 upvotes, 68 comments
  29. Show HN: 1v1 coding game that LLMs struggle with 6 upvotes, 5 comments
  30. Multifactor (YC F25) Is Hiring an Engineering Lead 0 upvotes, 0 comments
